payload.title: Require client certs from native clients (mTLS)
payload.description:
Configure the HTTPS server to request (not require) client certs — `requestCert: true, rejectUnauthorized: false`. In the auth middleware, accept a valid client cert signed by the local CA as authentication (in addition to the existing bearer token for browsers). Map the cert serial to a paired device for audit logging.

Acceptance:
- Native request with a paired client cert: 200, no bearer token needed
- Native request with an unknown cert: 401
- Browser request without a cert: falls through to bearer-token path (unchanged)
- Audit log includes device name on cert-authed requests

Depends on the HTTPS and pairing stories.
